ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the sampling site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site and its environmental characteristics */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., lake, river, ocean) */,
  "ecosystem_type" TEXT /* Type of ecosystem (e.g., freshwater, marine) */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Detailed geographical information (e.g., coordinates, depth) */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* General environmental conditions of the site */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the site information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "month_number" INTEGER /* Numeric representation of the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., Winter, Spring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "average_chla" (
  "avg_chla_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each average chlorophyll entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "avg_chl_a_value" REAL /* Average chlorophyll a concentration value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("avg_chla_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample type (e.g., A, B) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead, assistant) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Field of expertise of the researcher */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_months" (
  "study_month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study month entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month number of the study month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample for which the report is generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings related to the sample */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file (if stored as a file) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the sample data */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was last updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in the version */,
  "versioned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_versioned_by FOREIGN KEY ("versioned_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
